title: Bunnies Picnic Knot Wrap
description: Show them how much you appreciate hopping around with them during Easter by wrapping up all their Lush favourites with this colourful Knot Wrap. Hop to it!

images.alt: Bunnies Picnic. A square, fabric Knot Wrap featuring a colourful, cartoon-style pattern of cheerful rabbits and chicks. The characters are illustrated in bright shades of pink, blue, yellow, and purple against a multi-coloured, geometric background.

The image shows the colourful "Bunnies Picnic" knot wrap, tied in a traditional Japanese knot, resting on a slatted wooden bathtub tray. The wrap features colourful flowers and characters in bright yellow, pink, and blue.

A model's tattooed arms reach over a white bathtub to untie a "Bunnies Picnic" knot wrap tied neatly around a gift. The parcel sits on a slatted wooden bath tray above soapy water, with a modern black tap and mint tiles in the background.

A super close-up of the vibrant "Bunnies Picnic" knot wrap featuring a repeat pattern of colourful, cartoon-style bunnies and chicks amidst flowers. The design uses a bright palette of pink, yellow, blue, and green.
